name: Strike World: Deadverse Reloaded the Anime
original_name: モンスターストライク デッドバースリローデッド
overview: Rinne, a girl who cannot see the faces of others, is born into a family of exorcists. On her first mission, she faces an incomprehensible foe and is rescued by the mysterious Jugemu. Rinne learns that all worlds, known as "Strike World," are threatened. She begins a journey with Jugemu through these dying worlds, forging deep bonds along the way.

trailers.title: 【特報】アニメ「モンスターストライク」新シリーズ制作決定！
